# GitHub Copilot Instructions

## Project Overview

HomeStream is a .NET project studying Home Assistant, MQTT, Orleans, and Aspire integration.

## Architecture

- **HomeStream.Orleans** - Orleans actor system
- **HomeStream.MqttBridge** - MQTT integration layer
- **HomeStream.Projections** - Data projections and views
- **HomeStream.Aspire** - Aspire orchestration

## Coding Standards

- Follow .NET coding conventions
- Use async/await for I/O operations
- Write unit tests for new functionality
- Document architectural decisions in ADRs
